title: GS-104-15  15 Amp Anti Restart Device for 110 Volt Machinery (PLUG & PLAY)
content:
Anti-Restart Control 15 amp
GS-104-15 (Plug and Play)
Directly plug your machine into the GS-104 receptacle and plug the GS-104 into a standard 110-volt receptacle. Good for I.5 H.P. motors up to 15 amps. Wall Cord is 8′ long. Now includes a removable fuse holder and latching emergency stop button!!!

title: GS-104-20  20 Amp  Anti Restart Device for 110 Volt Machinery (PLUG & PLAY VERSION)

Directly plug your machines Nema 5-20p plug in the GS-104-20 Nema 5-20R receptacle and plug the GS-104-20 Nema 5-20P plug into a 20 amp receptacle. Good for I.5 H.P. motors up to 20 amps. Wall cord is 8′ long. Now includes a removeable fuse holder and latching emergency stop button!!

title: GS-105 Anti-Restart Control for Vertical Milling Machines
content:
GS-105 Anti-Restart Control for Vertical Milling Machines

Specifically designed for upgrading electrical compliance on milling machines such as Bridgeport, Sharp, and Jet. The GS-105 will provide anti-restart functionality, a step-down transformer, a fused main power lockable disconnect switch, start/stop, and forward-reverse operators with latching emergency stop button. (Controls will be mounted on a remote operator station or on the main control panel face). Good for motors up to 5. H.P (Please provide motor horsepower, motor amperage, and line voltage when ordering).

title: GS-106 Anti-Restart Control for other three phase machinery
content:
GS-106
Specifically designed for upgrading electrical compliance on other 3 phase machinery such as grinders, lathes, drill presses, sanders, and horizontal mills. The GS-106 will provide anti-restart functionality, a step-down transformer, a fused main power lockable disconnect switch, start/stop and optional forward reverse operators with latching emergency stop button. (Controls can be mounted on a remote operator's station or on the main control box panel face). (Please provide motor horsepower, motor amperage, line voltage and specify if a reversing function is needed when ordering) Call for Pricing

title: DPG-ES1 Econ Series Drill Guard for 2" to 4" column diameter
content:
• Works on small to mid-size drill presses, bench-top and floor models.
  • Billet aluminum 2 piece column clamp provides a bolt-on installation - no drilling! Installs in 5 minutes or less.
  • Slotted aluminum extrusion allows adjustment in/out and up/down to clear different work setups and table heights.
  • Steel adjustable lever for easy re-positioning
  • Shield flips upward 180 degrees for part/ drill bit change.
  • Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"
  • 1/4" thick lexan (polycarbonate) shield.  See photos for dimensions on each part number guard
  • Replacement drill press shields for Econ-Series are available

title: DPG-2 Drill Press Guard for up to 18" throat
content:
• Available with or without a safety interlock switch. Select when ordering. Safety switches are rated to only 2 amps and require some form of motor control to adapt to your 3 phase machine.
  • Drill press safety shield protects operators from flying chips, coolant, and accidental contact with the rotating cutter / spindle. Polycarbonate shield (lexan) 1/4" thick
  • Front arm swings open to the left 180 degrees for easy setup and work access
  • Articulating arms allow operator to easily position the shield to fit different work-pieces or fixtures
  • Installs in minutes - Truly bolt-on, no drilling required
  • Clamps to the machine's round column and designed to clear the gear rack
  • Heavy duty steel adjustable handles- pull out and orient 360 degrees
  • Curved Lexan shield- 10" wide x 8" high with 4" deep sides.
  • All CNC billet aluminum construction, Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"
  • If you are unsure of which drill press guard to select, please click here for the dimension form.  Complete the form and email us.

title: MG-4 DRILL MILL GUARD FLUSH MOUNT
content:
In stock. Ships the same day if ordered by 3PM EST

The ATS "Universal Mount" Milling and Drilling Machine Guard mounts by drilling and tapping holes in the machine.  Works with large/ non-standard milling machines, drill presses without a round column, and some radial arm drill press machines.  Please contact us for fitment questions. Note: If you have a Bridgeport / standard vertical mill, part # MG-3 or MG-2 OR MG-2  are better options!

Part #

MG-4 - Standard Model, no interlock. Left side mounting $540.00 MG-4-RH - Standard Model, no interlock. Right side mounting/ opening. $540.00 Safety Switch Option  Add " -SK1 " to the end of part number (ie. MG-4-SK1)    - Interlocked Model. Magnetically Actuated Safety Interlock Switch. Dual Voltage 120VAC / 24VDC.  $725.00 Available with or without a safety interlock switch. Select when ordering. Safety switches are rated to only 2 amps and require some form of motor control to adapt to your 3 phase machine.

title: MG-2 / MG-2T MILLING MACHINE GUARDS
content:
In Stock. Ships the same day if ordered by 3PM EST

Part #

MG-2 - Standard Model, no interlock. 2.5" sq. bolt pattern (Bridgeport and most copies). $690.00 MG-2T - Standard Model, no interlock. 3 x 3.5" bolt pattern (Some TRAK machines, DPM5)  $690.00 MG-2-SK1 - Interlocked Machine Guard Model, 2.5" pattern, Magnetically Actuated Safety Interlock Switch. Dual Voltage 120VAC / 24VDC.  $875.00 MG-2T-SK1 - Interlocked Model, 3 x 3.5" pattern, Magnetically Actuated Safety Interlock Switch. Dual Voltage 120VAC / 24VDC.  $875.00  

Features

  • 2 Bolt patterns for barrier guards: Select when ordering.  The 2.5" square bolt pattern (MG-2) fits Bridgeports and 95% of other milling machines.
  • Available with or without a safety interlock switch. Select when ordering. Safety switches are rated to only 2 amps and require some form of motor control to adapt to your 3 phase machine.
  • The mounting plates are slotted outwards to accommodate slight differences in machine bolt pattern.  The 2.5" square pattern can work with up to 2.75" or 70mm square.
  • This head mount milling machine guard protects operators from flying chips, coolant, and accidental contact with the rotating cutter / spindle. Polycarbonate shield (lexan) 1/4" thick
  • Front arm swings open to the left 180 degrees for easy setup and work access
  • No drilling required to install! Bolts around the quill feed selector with longer bolts we supply.  Works on Bridgeport, Sharp, Jet, Trak, Prototrak DPM, HH Roberts, Clausing, Lagun, Webb, Supermax, Alliant and many other manual vertical milling machines.
  • Articulating arms allow operator to easily position the shield to fit different work-pieces or fixtures
  • Heavy duty steel adjustable handles- pull out and orient 360 degrees
  • Head mount milling machine guard will not work if tilting the machine's head left and right (only front/back)
  • Includes curved lexan shield
  • All CNC billet aluminum construction, Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"
  • Contact us for special mount for Series II Bridgeports with power downfeed and other custom mounting plates for non-standard knee mills.

title: MG-3 RAM MOUNT MILLING MACHINE GUARD
content:
In stock. Ships the same day if ordered by 3PM EST
Part #
MG-3 - Standard Model, no interlock. $745.00

MG-3-SK1 - Interlocked Model. Magnetically Actuated Safety Interlock Switch. Dual Voltage 120VAC / 24VDC. $930.00

 

Features
Installs in minutes on most manual vertical milling machines- Truly bolt-on. No drilling into machine is required!
Bolts to the large threaded hole on top of the ram originally used as the lifting point. Designed around a series I Bridgeport, but fits most brands out there. We supply the correct hardware/ arm length based on the machine brand. Enter your machine's brand before adding to cart.
Available with or without a safety interlock switch. Select when ordering. Safety switches are rated to only 2 amps and require some form of motor control to adapt to your 3 phase machine.
Protects operators from flying chips, coolant, and accidental contact with the rotating cutter / spindle. Polycarbonate shield (lexan) 1/4" thick
Front arm swings open to the left 180 degrees for easy setup and work access
D.R.O mount extender included (since this is where most DRO's mount)
Milling machine chip guard features heavy duty steel adjustable handles- pull out and orient 360 degrees
Articulating arms allow operator to easily position the shield to fit different work-pieces or fixtures. Guard can also be adjusted left to right on the rail.
Ram mount milling machine guard works with head tilted left/right, as shown with optional flat shield
Includes curved lexan shield
Industrial T-slot extrusion provides a way to mount work lamp or other accessories.
All CNC billet aluminum construction, Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"

title: SHD-181412F Shield Assembly With 14" x 11¾" x 3/16" Flat Shield and 18" Snake Arm For Bench / Pedestal Grinders
content: Each flat snake-arm shield assembly consists of a flat polycarbonate shield that is 3/16" thick (0.177" ± 10%), a shield bracket assembly, a snake arm with a direct-mount base, and mounting hardware. The direct-mount base can be fastened to most any flat surface at least 2" x 1" with the included mounting hardware (two ¼"-20 x ¾" hex socket-head cap screws, two ¼"-20 nylon-insert hex locknuts, and two No. 12 pan-head Phillips x 1" zinc-plated sheet-metal screws). Optional mounting bases and brackets can be added to the direct-mount base to provide additional mounting flexibility. There is a magnetic base, C-clamp base, and horizontal and vertical right-angle brackets. The magnetic base consists of a 3¼"-diameter magnet with 100 pounds of holding force. The C-clamp base can be mounted to a table or ledge up to 1 7/8" thick. The horizontal and vertical right-angle brackets can be helpful in positioning the shield where you need it depending on the position the base is to be mounted. Our flat snake-arm shields are proudly made in the United States of America!

title: TR-3A DRILL PRESS GUARD (LARGE)  WITH INTERLOCK
content:
FEATURES OF THE LARGE DRILL PRESS CHUCK GUARD

This safety shield was designed to be installed on larger machines such as geared head drill presses or small radial drills. It comes with a built-in interlock switch and mounting bracket. Do you have a small drill press?  If you have a drill press with a motor in the back and pulleys, you might want to consider our model TR-2 drill press chuck guard. The curved shield design allows three sides of the chuck to be covered.  By using the adjustment screw, you can adjust the position of the shield easily. An interlock switch is included inside the mounting bracket assembly.  This protects the switch from any dirt or debris and prevents tampering with the switch.

INSTALLING THIS GUARD

Watch out!  Don’t forget to check where you’re drilling.  Radial drills and geared head drill presses have gearboxes filled with oil.  You don’t want to drill into an oil reservoir and drain all the oil.  Even worst, drilling into a gearbox and breaking something inside.  Take your time when drilling into any machine.

title: Gemco Ametek 1999SEMC PORTABLE STOP TIME METER
content:
The NEWLY DESIGNED Semelex unit is a self-contained, portable, multi-purpose diagnostic system for industrial press room automation and operator safety device analysis. The Semelex can quickly calculate machinery stopping time and determine the minimum safe distance for safety devices including light curtains, palm buttons, E-Stop, and safety mats.

The 1999SEMC Semelex II Safetimeter Test Set is field-proven to accurately measure press stop time and safety distance to verify compliance with federal and state requirements. Designed for harsh industrial environments, the unit is portable, lightweight, battery-operated, and easy to use.

The Semelex Safetimeter is capable of measuring elapsed time, stop time (Ts) from 1-9999 milliseconds. It also calculates the minimum safety distance (Ds) based on the OSHA formula, as understood by the factory, and will display up to 999.9 inches to the nearest 0.1 inches.

Optional 5 year limited warranty covers all yearly recalibrations add $1,724.00

title: 13464 Flexbar Vertical Band Saw Guard
content:
Provides Complete Protection Between Cutting Blade and Operator's Hands and Eyes.

Features Include:
  • "L" Shaped Lexan® Shield, 6"H x 6"W x 4"D
  • Easy position handle
  • Adjustable tension 9" long Flexbar arm permits correct setting of guard for each setup
  • Includes vertical angle mounting bracket with 11" of height adjustment
  • Kit includes mounting screws and self locking nuts. Simply drill and tap 2 holes and install.
Installs on most band saws with 18" maximum throat height. Optional extra-long vertical angle bracket assembly available for larger throat height machines.

title: Scissor Gates
content: Expandable rear guarding scissor style gating for guarding areas that require quick and easy access.  These scissor gates can span up to 30 feet and are electrically interlocked. These style gates protect personnel from hazards and are particularly useful when applied to the rear area of shears, power presses and press brakes.  We offer customizable sizes and side panel "wing" panels to fit the application.
